mapper.select:
SELECT id, s_info_code AS sInfoCode, s_info_name AS sInfoName, b_info_fullname AS bInfoFullname, b_info_issuer AS bInfoIssuer, b_issue_amountplan AS bIssueAmountplan, b_info_carrydate AS bInfoCarrydate, b_info_maturitydate AS bInfoMaturitydate, rating_bond AS ratingBond, rating_bondissuer AS ratingBondissuer, d_bond_type AS dBondType, b_info_couponrate AS bInfoCouponrate, date_exists AS dateExists FROM sirm_bondinfo
AND s_info_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bondCode}, '%')
AND s_info_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bondShortName}, '%')
AND b_info_issuer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{issuer}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, s_info_code AS sInfoCode, s_info_name AS sInfoName, b_info_fullname AS bInfoFullname, b_info_issuer AS bInfoIssuer, s_windcode_nib AS sWindcodeNib, s_windcode_sh AS sWindcodeSh, s_windcode_sz AS sWindcodeSz, b_issue_amountplan AS bIssueAmountplan, b_issue_amountact AS bIssueAmountact, b_info_couponrate AS bInfoCouponrate, b_info_carrydate AS bInfoCarrydate, b_info_maturitydate AS bInfoMaturitydate, b_info_pledge_ratio AS bInfoPledgeRatio, rating_bond_agency AS ratingBondAgency, rating_bond AS ratingBond, rating_bondissuer AS ratingBondissuer, rating_outlook AS ratingOutlook, b_agency_grnttype AS bAgencyGrnttype, guarantor AS guarantor, b_agency_name AS bAgencyName, inner_issuer_rating AS innerIssuerRating, d_bond_type AS dBondType, inner_guarantor_rating AS innerGuarantorRating, date_exists AS dateExists, b_fund_usage AS bFundUsage, b_prompt_reason AS bPromptReason, b_analysis AS bAnalysis FROM sirm_bondinfo WHERE id = #{bondId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ip_adjust_log (bond_code, bond_short_name, bond_type, adjust_type, adjust_mode, target_pool_id, target_pool_name, pool_type, audit_status, adjuster_id, adjuster_name, adjust_reason, adjust_advice, attachment_files, material_files, submit_time, is_deleted, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{bondCode}, #{bondShortName}, #{bondType}, #{adjustType}, #{adjustMode}, #{targetPoolId}, #{targetPoolName}, #{poolType}, #{auditStatus}, #{adjusterId}, #{adjusterName}, #{adjustReason}, #{adjustAdvice}, #{attachmentFiles}, #{materialFiles}, NOW(), 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT ips.target_pool_name AS poolName, ips.pool_type AS poolType, DATE_FORMAT(ips.entry_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate, '在池' AS status FROM ip_pool_status ips WHERE ips.bond_code = #{bondCode} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0

SELECT ips.target_pool_name AS poolName, ips.pool_type AS poolType, DATE_FORMAT(MIN(ips.entry_time), '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate, COUNT(DISTINCT ips.bond_code) AS bondCount, '在池' AS status FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN sirm_bondinfo sb ON ips.bond_code = sb.s_info_code WHERE sb.b_info_issuer = ( SELECT b_info_issuer FROM sirm_bondinfo WHERE s_info_code = #{bondCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY ips.target_pool_name, ips.pool_type

SELECT al.id, al.bond_code AS bondCode, al.bond_short_name AS bondShortName, al.bond_type AS bondType, al.adjust_type AS adjustType, al.adjust_mode AS adjustMode, al.target_pool_id AS targetPoolId, al.target_pool_name AS targetPoolName, al.pool_type AS poolType, al.audit_status AS auditStatus, al.adjuster_id AS adjusterId, al.adjuster_name AS adjusterName, al.adjust_reason AS adjustReason, al.adjust_advice AS adjustAdvice, al.attachment_files AS attachmentFiles, al.material_files AS materialFiles, al.submit_time AS submitTime, al.audit_time AS auditTime, al.entry_time AS entryTime FROM ip_adjust_log al WHERE al.bond_code = #{bondCode} AND al.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY al.crte_time DESC
